text:
Once upon a time in a sun-kissed seaside town, lived a plucky old sea captain named Harry. He was known throughout the islands by his bold ventures and the colorful characters he gathered on his voyages.

One sunny autumn day, as Harry was preparing for another grand trip, he found himself reminiscing about stories passed down to him by the sailors he'd traveled with. Three decades before, he'd embarked on a voyage that began with such naiveté but ended with a tale so enchanting it became his life's secret treasure.

The ship, the Sea Sprite, was small but swift. It sailed through azure waters surrounded by cliffs kissed by the golden hues of the setting sun. One fine morning, as Harry braved a storm that promised to be the test of his life, he spotted a peculiar glint in the distance—a small, glittering isle that should not be there.
